core_invariant: no valid continuity chain -> no valid authority -> no valid execution

assumptions.assumption: identity/session origin remains authentic and bound to authority creation
assumptions.required_closure: authority creation must bind identity/session/continuity metadata
cascade revocation to continuity, authority, validation, and execution

assumptions.assumption: scope cannot expand from authority to AEO to execution
canonical object hash remains stable across runtime versions
proof cannot exist without execution lineage
assumptions.required_closure: proof requires execution_id and authority lineage

assumptions.assumption: remote evidence cannot become local authority by default
assumptions.required_closure: federation evidence remains observability-only unless bound

assumptions.assumption: root credentials remain external sovereignty assumptions until contained
assumptions.required_closure: root authority registry and containment plan
